testcase.classname: Searching for Products in Amazon Website
testcase.name: User should be able to Search for necessary product
testcase.skipped: Given the user launches the website.........................................passed Given the user is on Amazon Home Page.......................................passed When the user enter name of the Product.....................................passed Then the user should be able to find the Product............................undefined

testcase.classname: Searching for Products in Amazon Website
testcase.name: User should be able to Search for necessary product

failure.message: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Amazon.in :Samsung Mobile] but found [Amazon.in : Samsung Mobile] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:93) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:512) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:134) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:115) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:189) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:199) at stepDefination.AmazonProducSearchingTest.the_user_should_be_able_to_find_the_Product(AmazonProducSearchingTest.java:52) at ✽.Then the user should be able to find the Product '"Samsung Mobile"'(AmazonProductSearching.feature:15)

testcase.failure:
Given the user launches the website.........................................passed Given the user is on Amazon Home Page.......................................passed When the user enter '"Samsung Mobile"'......................................passed Then the user should be able to find the Product '"Samsung Mobile"'.........failed
StackTrace: java.lang.AssertionError: expected [Amazon.in :Samsung Mobile] but found [Amazon.in : Samsung Mobile] at org.testng.Assert.fail(Assert.java:93) at org.testng.Assert.failNotEquals(Assert.java:512) at org.testng.Assert.assertEqualsImpl(Assert.java:134) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:115) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:189) at org.testng.Assert.assertEquals(Assert.java:199) at stepDefination.AmazonProducSearchingTest.the_user_should_be_able_to_find_the_Product(AmazonProducSearchingTest.java:52) at ✽.Then the user should be able to find the Product '"Samsung Mobile"'(AmazonProductSearching.feature:15)
